name: Master Orchestrator
description: Master coordinator for TheGent's agent workflows. Routes tasks to the correct workflow(s), manages scheduled execution blocks, dispatches workflows sequentially or in parallel where safe, coordinates cross-channel intelligence, monitors system health, and generates reports.

workflow_dispatch_concurrency.current_check: Count of currently running sub-agent dispatches

steps.name: Pre-Flight: Health Check
steps.description: Verify state manager and database connectivity. If stateless, abort entire orchestration. If degraded, warn and continue.

actions.description: Run state_manager health-check to verify FalkorDB + SQLite connectivity

post.message: State manager is stateless — cannot proceed. Sending Telegram alert and aborting all dispatches.
State manager is degraded — SQLite fallback active. Proceeding with caution.

outputs.health_mode: State manager mode: normal, degraded, or stateless

steps.name: Pre-Flight: Sync Backup Queue
steps.description: Flush any queued offline writes to FalkorDB. Idempotent — takes <100ms when empty. Run every block to keep sync lag under 4 hours.

actions.description: Sync SQLite backup queue to FalkorDB

post.message: Sync backup returned unexpected status — proceeding but data may be stale.

outputs.sync_result: Number of records synced and sync status

steps.name: Pre-Flight: Check Overdue Follow-Ups
steps.description: Query for follow-ups past their due date. If any exist, send Telegram escalation alert so Omar doesn't miss stale opportunities.

actions.description: List all pending follow-ups from state manager
Send Telegram alert if any follow-ups are overdue (due_date < today)

if_true.description: Send Telegram alert listing overdue follow-ups

arguments.text:
Overdue Follow-Ups

{{pending_followups.overdue_count}} follow-ups past due date:
{{pending_followups.overdue_summary}}

Action needed before today's block.

steps.name: Pre-Flight: Check Pause Flag
steps.description: Check graph-stats for pause flag. If paused, skip all runs and alert Omar via Telegram.

actions.description: Run graph-stats to check pause flag and system state
If paused, send Telegram alert and abort

if_true.description: Alert Omar that orchestrator is paused

arguments.text:
Orchestrator PAUSED

All workflow dispatches are suspended. The pause flag is set in FalkorDB.

To resume, clear the pause flag and re-run.

post.message: Orchestrator is paused — aborting all dispatches. Omar alerted via Telegram.

steps.name: Pre-Flight: Read Cross-Channel Messages
steps.description: Read all unread agent messages addressed to the orchestrator for cross-channel intelligence routing.

actions.description: Read all pending messages for the orchestrator agent

outputs.agent_messages: Array of cross-channel messages from other agents

steps.name: Step 1: Route — Determine Block
steps.description: Determine which workflow(s) to invoke based on current time (scheduled block) or Omar's intent (ad-hoc). Produces a dispatch_list of workflow IDs and an execution_mode (sequential/parallel).

actions.description: Match current time to a schedule block or classify Omar's ad-hoc intent

if_true.description: Match current time to schedule block and produce dispatch list

config.prompt:
Given the current time, match to the orchestrator schedule and return a JSON dispatch list. Schedule blocks:
- 07:30-09:59: Morning BD → [outlook_triage, outlook_bd, linkedin_triage, linkedin_bd] (sequential)
- 10:00-11:59: Morning Content → [content_creator] (parallel-safe)
- 13:30-13:59: Afternoon BD → [outlook_triage, linkedin_triage] (sequential)
- 16:00-17:29: Afternoon Content → [content_creator] (parallel-safe, polish+publish)
- 17:30-18:30: Evening → [outlook_triage, daily_report] (sequential)
- Fri 16:30-17:30: Weekly → [weekly_report]
- Sun 01:30-03:00: Maintenance → [archive, reseed, sync, stats]
Note: growth_engine is RETIRED — do not dispatch.
Return: {"block_name": "...", "dispatch_list": [...], "execution_mode": "sequential|parallel", "description": "..."}

if_false.description: Classify Omar's ad-hoc request and produce dispatch list using routing rules

config.prompt:
Classify the user's intent and map to workflow dispatch list using these routing rules:
- 'scan inbox'/'check email' → [outlook_triage]
- 'pipeline review'/'BD outreach' → [outlook_bd]
- 'scan LinkedIn'/'check LinkedIn' → [linkedin_triage]
- 'LinkedIn outreach'/'find LinkedIn prospects' → [linkedin_bd]
- 'create content'/'write a post' → [content_creator]
- 'grow followers'/'LinkedIn strategy' → RETIRED (inform user growth_engine is no longer active)
- 'morning run'/'run BD' → [outlook_triage, outlook_bd, linkedin_triage, linkedin_bd] (sequential)
- 'afternoon run' → [outlook_triage, linkedin_triage] (sequential)
- 'full block'/'run everything' → all BD + content_creator (BD sequential, content parallel)
- 'prospect hunt' → [outlook_bd, linkedin_bd] (sequential)
- 'inbox clear' → [outlook_triage, linkedin_triage] (sequential)
Note: growth_engine is RETIRED — do not dispatch. linkedin_bd is Apollo prospect discovery only (no PhantomBuster).
If ambiguous, set needs_clarification=true.
Return: {"block_name": "ad_hoc", "dispatch_list": [...], "execution_mode": "sequential|parallel", "needs_clarification": false, "description": "..."}

post.message: Could not determine which workflows to dispatch. Asking Omar for clarification.
Ambiguous intent — asking Omar which workflows to run.

outputs.block_name: Name of the matched schedule block or 'ad_hoc'
outputs.dispatch_list: Array of workflow IDs to dispatch

steps.name: Register Orchestrator Session
steps.description: Register the orchestrator session in FalkorDB for tracking and auditability.

actions.description: Register orchestrator session with block name and dispatch list

steps.name: Step 2a: Dispatch BD Block (Sequential)
steps.description: Dispatch BD workflows sequentially: outlook_triage → outlook_bd → linkedin_triage → linkedin_bd. Each sub-agent gets the full SKILL.md for its workflow. If one fails, log error and continue to next.

actions.description: Dispatch outlook_triage workflow via sub-agent

config.prompt: Execute the Outlook Inbox Triage workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/outlook/SKILL.md. Run all phases: fetch unread emails from both omar@thegent.uk and albakri.omar@gmail.com, classify, move noise to folders, draft replies, present for approval, send approved drafts, log to FalkorDB. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if outlook_triage failed

arguments.text: outlook_triage failed: {{outlook_triage_result.error}}. Continuing with next workflow.

actions.description: Dispatch outlook_bd workflow via sub-agent (only if in dispatch list)

config.prompt: Execute the Outlook BD via Apollo workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/outlook_BD_via _hubspot/SKILL.md. Run pipeline review, generate prospect lists via Apollo, draft cold outreach, present for approval, send approved emails, log to Apollo. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if outlook_bd failed

arguments.text: outlook_bd failed: {{outlook_bd_result.error}}. Continuing with next workflow.

actions.description: Dispatch linkedin_triage workflow via sub-agent (only if in dispatch list)

config.prompt: Execute the LinkedIn Inbox Triage workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/linkedin/SKILL.md. Scrape LinkedIn inbox, classify messages, draft replies, present for approval, send approved replies, log interactions. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if linkedin_triage failed

arguments.text: linkedin_triage failed: {{linkedin_triage_result.error}}. Continuing with next workflow.

actions.description: Dispatch linkedin_bd workflow via sub-agent (only if in dispatch list). Apollo prospect discovery only.

config.prompt: Execute the LinkedIn BD Prospecting workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/linkedin_BD/SKILL.md. Run prospect search and enrichment via Apollo, draft follow-up messages, log interactions. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if linkedin_bd failed

arguments.text: linkedin_bd failed: {{linkedin_bd_result.error}}. Continuing with next workflow.

steps.name: Step 2b: Dispatch Content Block (Parallel-Safe with BD)
steps.description: Dispatch content_creator workflow. Safe to run in parallel with BD block — no shared APIs or rate limits.

actions.description: Dispatch content_creator workflow via sub-agent

config.prompt: Execute the Content Creator workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/content_creator/SKILL.md. Run end-to-end: topic research, draft content, apply humanizer + quality gates, generate images via Imagen, publish to LinkedIn/X/blog as appropriate. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if content_creator failed

arguments.text: content_creator failed: {{content_creator_result.error}}. Continuing with remaining workflows.

steps.name: Step 2c: Dispatch Growth Engine (RETIRED)
steps.description: RETIRED: growth_engine workflow is no longer active. This step is kept for reference but will never dispatch.

actions.description: Dispatch growth_engine workflow via sub-agent

config.prompt: Execute the 10k Followers LinkedIn Growth Engine workflow. Read and follow the full SKILL.md at agent_workflows/10k_followers/linkedin-growth-engine/SKILL.md. Run the full 7-phase daily cycle: research → create → warm-up → publish → warm-down → outreach → analytics. Report results when complete.

actions.description: Send Telegram alert if growth_engine failed

steps.name: Step 2d: Dispatch Daily Report
steps.description: Generate and send the daily report via Telegram. Runs in evening block (18:15) or on explicit request.

actions.description: Generate daily report from state manager
Send daily report via Telegram

steps.name: Step 2e: Dispatch Weekly Report
steps.description: Generate and send the weekly BD report via Telegram. Runs Friday 17:00 or on explicit request.

actions.description: Generate weekly report from state manager
Send weekly report via Telegram

steps.name: Step 2f: Dispatch Maintenance Block
steps.description: Run Sunday maintenance: archive old interactions, re-seed knowledge, sync backup queue, graph stats. All sequential.

actions.description: Archive interactions older than 90 days
Re-seed knowledge base from Helios source if files have changed
Sync backup queue (full flush during maintenance window)
Generate graph stats for maintenance report
Send maintenance report via Telegram

arguments.text:
Maintenance Complete

Archived: {{archive_result.archived_count}} interactions (>90 days)
Knowledge: {{reseed_result.status}}
Sync: {{maintenance_sync_result.synced}} records flushed
Graph: {{maintenance_stats.total_nodes}} nodes, {{maintenance_stats.total_edges}} edges

System healthy. Next block: Monday 08:00.

steps.name: Step 3: Cross-Channel Coordination
steps.description: After all workflow dispatches complete, post a STATUS_UPDATE message for all agents summarizing the block results.

actions.description: Collect and summarize results from all dispatched workflows

config.prompt:
Collect the results from all dispatched workflows and produce a summary JSON:
{
  "block": "{{routing_decision.block_name}}",
  "completed": [list of workflow IDs that succeeded],
  "failed": [list of workflow IDs that failed],
  "skipped": [list of workflow IDs that were skipped],
  "metrics": {
    "emails_processed": N,
    "emails_sent": N,
    "linkedin_messages": N,
    "connections_sent": N,
    "content_published": N,
    "follow_ups_created": N,
    "errors": N
  }
}

actions.description: Post STATUS_UPDATE message for all agents via FalkorDB

outputs.block_summary: Summary of all workflow results for this block

steps.name: Step 4: Block Summary via Telegram
steps.description: Send comprehensive block summary to Omar via Telegram after all workflows in a block complete.

actions.description: Send block summary via Telegram

format_validations.message: CRITICAL: Telegram summary contains email addresses — must not send confidential info
CRITICAL: Telegram summary contains credentials — must not send

pre.check: telegram_text does NOT contain email addresses, sender names, deal values, or confidential information
pre.message: CRITICAL: Telegram block summary contains confidential information — must not send

steps.name: Step 5: Log Session & Cleanup
steps.description: Log the completed orchestrator session to FalkorDB and clean up temp files.

actions.description: Log final orchestrator session with full metrics

config.command: python C:/Users/OmarAl-Bakri/Claude_Code_Automations/scripts/state_manager.py log-session --session-id "orchestrator-{{date}}-{{time}}" --agent-name "orchestrator" --skills-run "{{block_summary.completed}}" --contacts-processed {{block_summary.metrics.emails_processed || 0}} --interactions-logged {{block_summary.metrics.emails_sent || 0}} --follow-ups-created {{block_summary.metrics.follow_ups_created || 0}} --summary "{{routing_decision.block_name}} block complete. Completed: {{block_summary.completed}}. Failed: {{block_summary.failed}}. Errors: {{block_summary.metrics.errors || 0}}"

actions.description: Clean up orchestrator temp files (NOT shared-intel)

rules.message: CRITICAL: Telegram message contains confidential info
CRITICAL: Telegram message contains sensitive data
Telegram messages must be plain text

rules.auto_fix_action: Split into multiple messages or truncate

rules.message: Report must be plain text for Telegram
